name: liquidity_mgmt
description: a bank liquidity/reserve management world; actions lend, borrow, hold to meet reserves

card.description: a bank liquidity/reserve management world; actions lend, borrow, hold to meet reserves

rules: The bank must keep cash at or above its required reserve, which equals reserve_ratio * deposits.
'lend' moves lend_amount of cash into loans (never more cash than is held); this raises future interest income but lowers liquid reserves.
'borrow' raises borrow_amount of cash from the funding window, increasing both cash and borrowings (and future interest expense).
'repay' uses cash to pay down borrowings, limited by both cash on hand and outstanding borrowings, reducing future interest expense.
'hold' takes no balance-sheet action and simply lets reserves sit while a period elapses.
Every step advances one period: loans accrue interest_income at loan_rate and borrowings accrue interest_expense at borrow_rate; net interest is added to cash and to cumulative profit.
After each step, compliant is true iff cash >= required_reserve, and reserve_shortfall reports any deficit.

transition.code:
def transition(state, action):
    s = dict(state)
    name = action.get("name", "hold")
    params = action.get("params", {}) or {}

    cash = float(s.get("cash", 0.0))
    loans = float(s.get("loans", 0.0))
    deposits = float(s.get("deposits", 0.0))
    borrowings = float(s.get("borrowings", 0.0))
    ratio = float(s.get("reserve_ratio", 0.0))
    loan_rate = float(s.get("loan_rate", 0.0))
    borrow_rate = float(s.get("borrow_rate", 0.0))
    profit = float(s.get("profit", 0.0))

    lend_amt = float(params.get("amount", s.get("lend_amount", 0.0)))
    borrow_amt = float(params.get("amount", s.get("borrow_amount", 0.0)))

    if name == "lend":
        amt = max(0.0, min(lend_amt, cash))   # cannot lend cash it does not hold
        cash -= amt
        loans += amt
    elif name == "borrow":
        amt = max(0.0, borrow_amt)
        cash += amt
        borrowings += amt
    elif name == "repay":
        amt = max(0.0, min(borrow_amt, cash, borrowings))
        cash -= amt
        borrowings -= amt
    # 'hold' (and any unknown action) makes no balance-sheet move.

    # Time advances one period: interest accrues on assets and liabilities.
    earned = round(loan_rate * loans, 4)
    paid = round(borrow_rate * borrowings, 4)
    net = round(earned - paid, 4)
    cash = round(cash + net, 4)
    profit = round(profit + net, 4)

    required = round(ratio * deposits, 4)
    s["day"] = int(s.get("day", 0)) + 1
    s["cash"] = cash
    s["loans"] = round(loans, 4)
    s["deposits"] = round(deposits, 4)
    s["borrowings"] = round(borrowings, 4)
    s["interest_income"] = earned
    s["interest_expense"] = paid
    s["required_reserve"] = required
    s["reserve_shortfall"] = round(max(0.0, required - cash), 4)
    s["compliant"] = cash >= required
    s["profit"] = profit
    return s

emit.report: Day {day}: cash {cash} vs required {required_reserve} (shortfall {reserve_shortfall}); borrowings {borrowings}; cumulative profit {profit}; compliant={compliant}.
